case_title: MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. VS. ANTONIO RAMIREZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANTONIO RAMIREZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF IS EXEMPT FROM FILING WITH THE SECRETARY OF STATE AS THEY ARE NOT TRANSACTING INTRASTATE BUSINESS. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT ITS CLAIMS. DEFENDANT MUST FILE ANSWER WITHIN 15 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: RHONDA AQUILINA, CSR 	956
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Set For Trial On May-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANTONIO RAMIREZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Elizabeth A. MacDonald (922.5939) for plaintiff and opposing party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's demurrer is overruled. Plaintiff is exempt from filing with the Secretary of State as they are not transacting intrastate business. Plaintiff has provided sufficient facts to support its claims. Defendant must file answer within 15 days. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, CSR 956

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-03-2011 Continued To Aug-25-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANTONIO RAMIREZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to August 25, 2011. Opposing party to provide courtesy copy of opposing papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B. Please lodge those papers directly with department 302. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
